message:
refactor(parser): use keyword_str() for kw_to_str and reformat long error line

kw_to_str (parser.rs):
- Replace the Debug-format-then-strip-prefix approach with a call to
  the TokenKind::keyword_str() method, which returns the canonical
  string for known keyword tokens directly. This avoids relying on the
  Debug representation remaining stable (which is a fragile assumption
  across refactors) and avoids an unnecessary heap allocation for the
  common case where keyword_str() returns Some. The Debug-format path
  is retained as a fallback for non-keyword tokens.

Formatting:
- Reformat the long `err_expected(...)` return in the EXCLUDE clause
  parsing branch to comply with rustfmt line-length limits. No logic
  change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
